title: Anthropic accuses Alibaba of campaign to 'brazenly' and 'illicitly' extract AI capabilities
summary_full: The letter, which was obtained by CNBC, claims Alibaba carried out "the largest known distillation attack on Anthropic to date."
summary_public: The letter, which was obtained by CNBC, claims Alibaba carried out "the largest known distillation attack on Anthropic to date."
